ddls:
CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the generation */,
  "stderr" REAL /* Standard error of the generation */,
  "mean_collisions" REAL /* Mean number of collisions in the generation */,
  "collision_stderr" REAL /* Standard error of collisions in the generation */,
  "collisions_min" INTEGER /* Minimum number of collisions in the generation */,
  "collisions_max" INTEGER /* Maximum number of collisions in the generation */,
  "mean_wires" REAL /* Mean number of wires in the generation */,
  "mean_wires_stderr" REAL /* Standard error of wires in the generation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the generation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the generation ended */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used in this generation */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Description of the environment in which the generation was run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the dataset belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset file in bytes */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., experiment, simulation) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., uploaded, processing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Latency of the access request in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collision_data" (
  "collision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collision data point */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the collision data belongs to */,
  "collision_value" REAL /* Value of the collision */,
  "wire_value" REAL /* Value of the wire */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the collision event */,
  "location_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the collision event */,
  "location_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the collision event */,
  "location_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the collision event */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the object at the time of collision */,
  "impact_force" REAL /* Force of the impact in the collision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collision_data_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value (e.g., percentage, number) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last updated */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Path to a thumbnail image of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)
